item.title: People with unusual laughs were invited to sit together on a French show.
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Successful extraction from a bad situation. UPDATE.
item.description: So the other day I posted a question about the anonymity of Uber/Lyft rides because they were going to order one to my place. Imgur suggested that I reach out to local shelters for help. Because my friend’s phone is closely monitored by the ex I did it all myself so that there was less chance of them getting caught. A nice person at the first shelter I called agreed to order the ride with their company account and used their location as a neutral meeting place. They took down my information (just in case I was someone trying to take advantage of them) and verified that my friend was going with me willingly. A cop was on scene as well and took my friend’s official statement that they don’t want their location divulged to their ex. Now they are in my spare bedroom and snoozing peacefully.
item.dc:creator: LordOfZajo

Stay sane or insane everyone!
item.dc:creator: TheCrowGirl

item.title: Meet Mama Biscuit & her 2 beautiful babies - Shelter cats are the best cats
item.description:
New adventure, new beginning.
Let's take a shower kiddos! - Mama Biscuit :D
Mama Biscuit's babies Butter & Jam :)
Meet the big brother Joey for the first time.
Update : Butter & Jam have found their furrever home. They have been adopted together. :) Despite them leaving, Mama Biscuit has been acting completely normal. Mama Biscuit is just waiting to go to her furrever home. She actually has someone is very interested in her, but they are out of town for another couple weeks. Hopefully once they are back, Mama Biscuit can move to her forever home. :) Source :https://instagram.com/kittyboyandfriends

item.dc:creator: AgeingAss

item.title: Freshly Stolen Memes - A Dump for Paul #11
item.description: Dog tax of Louie. Louie belonged to Paul (from the title!) who is dying of lung cancer. He has been given 6 months at most. He is in dire straits financially since he cannot work and only recently got approved for Medicade. (He is 36 and has 2 kids). He has sold his possessions of value and this fundraiser is a last resort option for him. He needs money for medical bills, rent, prescriptions, food, and eventually end of life expenses. If you are of a giving mind or have recently been possessed by a charitable ghost, he has recently set up a PayPal fundraiser here >> https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/8HFMSlCe6u Thank you to everyone who has sent well wishes, donated, and followed us thus far, we are very grateful for every like, message, and dollar, they make a tremendous difference. Please get any weird/new lumps and bumps on yourself checked, get weird coughs checked, and get a yearly physical if you can, it might save your life. Previous Dumps for Paul 1 - https://imgur.com/gallery/K0dLkFj 2- https://imgur.com/gallery/S2tHMzN 3- https://imgur.com/gallery/0vwotvp 4- https://imgur.com/gallery/63ld6W5 5 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KZM2YJk 6- https://imgur.com/gallery/pHlA2CO 7-https://imgur.com/gallery/dBm3gVd 8-https://imgur.com/gallery/43RiEnM 9-https://imgur.com/gallery/SOkxyfm 10- https://imgur.com/gallery/4IBWVn1 ***EDIT*** - Woke up to a most viral notification, many comments, and donations! I’m really glad you are enjoying these meme dumps and we’re very very grateful for every donation that comes in, every dollar makes a difference for him, thank you, thank you, thank you ❤️
item.dc:creator: WILLPMYOUYOURDESIRES

item.description: I spent a ton of my life in the military. I don’t regret that time, but this exact quote made me want to do something different with my life. Don’t want to get political at all.

item.title: Universities are for grifters
item.description: https://www.npr.org/2022/03/29/1089525660/a-former-yale-employee-admits-she-stole-40-million-in-electronics-from-the-unive Why is this not major news? The fact it took a decade for people to notice makes me think corruption like this is happening at schools all over this country. For a big name school like this to not care to investigate until the amount blew up to this size really ruins arguments from school administrators that degrees really require six figures in debt.
item.dc:creator: suoira

item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Chemo port removed yesterday!
item.description:
They didn’t let me keep it, but here it is! All the specks are from each time I got stabbed, for 12 rounds. What that meant for me was chemo infusions once a week for twelve weeks, and targeted antibody therapy once every three weeks for a year.
This is how it’s installed. The catheter goes directly into the main inlet vein of the heart. If it were just an arm IV, the risk is it could leak into the surrounding tissue which can damage it, since it’s such nasty stuff. I was very lucky that the kind of breast cancer I got is common and very well understood, and has incredibly effective drugs to fight it. Chemo and surgery was 100% effective, and I’m cancer free now! My doc even uses the word “cured,” not just in remission. I thought the device was nifty, so I wanted to share. Cheers, friends!
item.dc:creator: tomicGoober

item.title: Oh boy, here I go screaming into the void again
item.description:
"Caleb, I need you to cast Enlarge Person on me RIGHT NOW." EDIT: Art source is Orcbarbies. (Warning: Lewd)
Isn't Pibbles adorable? EDIT: art by Witch of Avalon. Character belongs to JHord1985
A combination of Klimt & Addams
Don't ask how a Half Aesir, Half Giant hooking up with a giantess produces a Half-corpse goddess, a sentient giant wolf, & the World's biggest danger noodle
Smug Strahd
The only "Toy Breed" of anything that won't make me immediately hate the person that thought it was a good idea
See, I typically run Golgari or Boros, so...
A comic I'm reading at the moment just did an update called "Gain"
This means you, Athens
Professor Randolph P. "Tex" Checkers
Anastaius Focht, post-Tukayyid
They also don't have hands
Food Wars, maybe?
Eridani Light Horse, I think. Which would explain why the Cyclops is up front. Edit: Phoenix Hawk, left fore; Griffin, left rear; Cicada, right rear. Right & left mid, IDK
I mean, you could do worse than a Marauder/Catapult Mashup. Like the Stone Rhino.
That's it. That's the series.
Kitten taks
item.dc:creator: OddBrock
